promise.title: Safe
promise.body: Background-checked team, ratio enforcement, secure check-in and check-out. Your kid is not handed off; they're signed out to you.

promise.title: Biblical
promise.body: Scripture-rooted curriculum. Every lesson grounded. Big idea, key verse, take-home question.

promise.title: Genuinely great
promise.body: Worship bands, science experiments, LEGO, games, quiet corners. Two hours kids ask to come back to.

byAge.label: 0–2 Nursery
byAge.what: Warm rooms, trained carers, familiar routines. We know their name, their allergies, and the song that settles them.

timeline.d: Digital wristband, parent gets a buzz-text code
Soft toys, music, carers on the floor
Buzz-text, signed release to the named adult

byAge.label: 3–5 Pre-K
byAge.what: Big imaginations, small chairs. Story, song, craft — the basics of faith in colour.

timeline.d: Craft or movement game tied to the story

byAge.label: 6–11 Elementary
byAge.what: Real questions, real answers. Loud worship, small-group conversations, experiments, deep laughs.

timeline.d: By age, led by trained leader

byAge.label: Tweens (11–12)
byAge.what: The bridge year. A space that takes their questions seriously before they move to Dreamers.

timeline.d: Small circles, leaders who remember last week

thisSunday.bigIdea: Jesus walks on water. We can step out when He says come.
thisSunday.question: Where is Jesus asking me to step out this week?

thisSunday.bigIdea: Staying close to Jesus is where good fruit comes from.
thisSunday.question: What's one way I stay close to Jesus each day?

thisSunday.bigIdea: The Father always runs to us.
thisSunday.question: How would I feel if the father ran to me?

thisSunday.bigIdea: God made me on purpose, with purpose.
thisSunday.question: One thing I like about how God made me?

team.name: Priya Sharma
team.oneLine: Runs nursery with two toddlers of her own.

team.name: Callum Hardy
team.oneLine: Pre-K lead. Also a part-time primary teacher.

team.name: Maya Okafor
team.oneLine: Elementary lead. Used to run after-school STEM.

team.name: Ayu Wijaya
team.oneLine: Kids pastor. Trained teacher, dancer, joy-carrier.

team.name: Josh Rivera
team.oneLine: Kids band leader + elementary teaching pastor.

faq.a: Yes — every volunteer has a current national background check on file. We also do a reference and trial period before anyone works with kids.

faq.q: My kid has special needs. Can you help?
faq.a: Yes. Reach out before you visit and we'll match a buddy volunteer and prep the space. Email kids@futures.church.
Digital wristband pairs parent and child with a matching code. No code, no pick-up. No exceptions.

faq.q: Can I sit in for my first visit?
faq.a: Absolutely. Many parents do for the first Sunday. You're welcome.
We buzz-text you. No guilt. You come when you come.
